parameters.jsCode: const seed = $('Seed Test Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: seed.chat_id, message: 'setup', test_mode: true } }];
const seed = $('Seed Test Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: seed.chat_id, message: seed.manual_message, test_mode: true } }];
const d = $('Extract Inventory Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.chat_id, button_id: d.confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];
const seed = $('Seed Test Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: seed.chat_id, message: seed.promo_message, test_mode: true } }];
const d = $('Extract Promo Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.chat_id, button_id: d.confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];
const d = $('Extract Image Import Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.chat_id, button_id: d.confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const seed = $('Seed Test Inputs').first().json || {}; const tag = String(seed.tag || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT 'inventory' AS kind, item_name, price::text AS price_text, stock::text AS stock_text, COALESCE(is_active, true)::text AS state, '' AS extra FROM public.inventory WHERE item_name ILIKE '%${tag}%' UNION ALL SELECT 'promo' AS kind, promo_code AS item_name, COALESCE(discount_value, 0)::text AS price_text, COALESCE(min_cart_value, 0)::text AS stock_text, COALESCE(is_active, true)::text AS state, COALESCE(description, '') AS extra FROM public.promotions WHERE COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE '%${tag}%';`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const seed = $('Seed Test Inputs').first().json || {}; const tag = String(seed.tag || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `UPDATE public.inventory SET is_active = false WHERE item_name ILIKE '%${tag}%'; UPDATE public.promotions SET is_active = false WHERE COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE '%${tag}%'; SELECT 'cleanup' AS result;`; })() }}
